# llms.txt — Brightlane Verified Merchant Directory
# https://brightlane.github.io/verified-merchant-directory/

> Brightlane is a verified affiliate merchant directory and blog. We publish honest product reviews and buyer guides across 15 languages. All merchants are verified partners through LinkConnector.

## About

Brightlane Verified Merchant Directory publishes affiliate-linked product reviews, comparisons, and buyer guides. Content covers software, education, pet care, print and signs, health, lifestyle, and services categories. All 24 merchants are verified through the LinkConnector affiliate network.

## Blog

The Brightlane blog publishes multilingual buyer guides in English, Mandarin Chinese, Spanish, French, German, Portuguese, Arabic, Hindi, Russian, Japanese, Korean, Indonesian, Italian, Dutch, and Polish.

## Merchants

- Movavi — Video editing software
- iSkysoft — Multimedia suite and data recovery
- Tenorshare — iPhone and Android tools
- Wondershare — Creative software suite
- Appy Pie — No-code app and chatbot builder
- KnowledgeHut — Tech certifications and training
- PM Training — PMP and project management certification
- CPR AED Course — Online CPR certification
- CPR Care — First aid and CPR training
- AHCA — Healthcare compliance training
- Discount Pet Care — Online pet pharmacy (USA)
- Canada Pet Care — Online pet pharmacy (Canada)
- BuildASign — Custom banners and signs
- Easy Canvas Prints — Photo canvas prints
- Canvas Discount — Discount canvas prints
- Canvas on the Cheap — Budget canvas prints
- Infinite Aloe — Organic aloe vera skincare
- Little Toe — Orthopedic foot care
- Combat Flip Flops — Mission-driven footwear
- Halloween Costumes — Costume retailer
- Shop LWW — Lippincott medical and nursing textbooks
- BGM Girl — Royalty-free background music
- Lafuent — OEM and aftermarket auto parts
- Tax Extension — Online federal tax extension filing

## Disclosure

This site contains affiliate links. We earn a commission when purchases are made through our links at no additional cost to the visitor. All merchants are verified partners through LinkConnector.
